questionHtml: State the immediate consequence of a species producing more offspring than the environment can support.
markschemeHtml:
competition/lack of resources/death/exceeding carrying capacity ✔

Allow a description of it.
Do not allow “overpopulation” or “natural selection”.

meta.title: State the immediate consequence of a species producing more offspring than the environment can support.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.1.3. Overproduction of offspring and competition for resources as factors that promote natural selection
